description_long: This is a vintage-style suitcase with a rectangular, boxy shape and rounded reinforced corners. The exterior is covered in a brown, leather-like material, giving it a classic and slightly worn appearance. Metal latches and corner protectors are visible, adding both durability and a touch of antique charm. A single fixed handle is attached to the front, designed for easy carrying. The suitcase appears to be solidly constructed, with no visible wheels or external pockets. Its overall look suggests it is intended for personal travel or storage in an urban environment.
description: A vintage brown suitcase with reinforced metal corners, metal latches, and a fixed handle. The exterior is leather-like and shows signs of wear, with no visible wheels or external pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fixed handle, two metal latches, and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain brown surface and reinforced corners, with the handle barely visible.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the uninterrupted brown surface and metal hinges, with no handle or latches visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the plain surface and reinforced corners.
